title: Domain validation of rankings
description: Domain expert review of all 7 ranking categories for cricket validity. Verify composite scoring weights produce sensible leaderboards. Spot-check top-10 and bottom-10 in each category against known IPL performance. Flag any surprising rankings for investigation. Validate that thresholds and minimum qualification criteria are appropriate.

2026-02-26T00:00:00Z.detail: Andy Flower domain validation complete. All 7 ranking categories PASS.
